message:
fix: add user-facing error toasts for silent catch blocks (#9391)

Add toast notifications to 5 catch blocks that previously only logged
errors to console without notifying the user:

- ClusterLocations: map SVG load failure
- NamespaceManager: namespace deletion and access revocation failures
- useMissionControl: AI suggestion and assignment request failures

Fixes #9390

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
